sentence: go to a news site, accept the cookie consent banner if one appears, then open the top headline

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab by navigating to a news site.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: Handle Cookie Consent
workflow.description: Accepting the cookie consent banner if it appears on the news site.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news
If a button with text 'Accept all' or 'Yes, I agree' or 'Continue' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Accept all' or 'Yes, I agree' or 'Continue'

workflow.name: Click Top Headline
workflow.description: Clicking the most prominent news headline on the page after handling any cookie consent.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news
If a link within an <h2> tag is visible
actions: Click the first link found within an <h2> tag

workflow.name: Headline Article Page
workflow.description: The top headline article page is now open, completing the task.
triggers: If the current URL contains bbc.com/news/
actions: Terminate: The top headline article has been opened.
